This visa is issued to applicants going to Italy for Religious purposes. It is a short term period visa (type "C") for stays up to 90 days or a long term period visa (type "D") for stays beyond 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is issued to applicants going to Italy for Religious purposes. It is a short term period visa (type "C") for stays up to 90 days or a long term period visa (type "D") for stays beyond 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[ita > zaf > en > Table:Long Term Visa > Religious Purposes > Visa Fees 1]

[ita > zaf > en > Table:Long Term Visa > Religious Purposes > Visa Fees 2]
*All charges are to be paid in Rands by Debit / Credit Card at the Center or  via cash deposit  into the below mentioned Bank account 
EFT Payments are not accepted.
- Bank Name: STANDARD BANK
- Branch Code: 012345
- Account Name: VFS Visa Processing SA PTY LTD
- Account Number: 012778842
PLEASE use passport number as reference

## Documents Required
IMPORTANT INFORMATION 
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7e5hZMBNjBlTl6tO4r2qG7/c89c578080f726e8ec61c66f0b7aa970/ITALY-CAPE-Schengen-and-D-Religious-Purposes-new.pdf) for a full list of documentary requirements.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their
                                                                                                                        religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 working days before the intended journey.
Applications can be submitted up to 6 months prior to departure date and no earlier.
Non-South African Citizens have to apply 20 working days prior to the departure date.

## Download Forms
Consulate of Italy Cape Town - Schengen Long Stay Application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/76PvIm4TyjXWFLMdUg0RbW/3d9307eb7db5be98f24cf57e0875f9f3/long-stay-application-2023-capetown.pdf)

Overview
The Schengen visa allows a foreign citizen to visit Italy and/or other Schengen countries for a limited period of time. The Schengen visa is strictly a tourist visa and does not give the holder the right to reside or work in Italy or any other Schengen country.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The Schengen visa allows a foreign citizen to visit Italy and/or other Schengen countries for a limited period of time. The Schengen visa is strictly a tourist visa and does not give the holder the right to reside or work in Italy or any other Schengen country.

## Visa Fees

[ita > zaf > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]

[ita > zaf > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 2]

*All charges are to be paid in Rands by Debit / Credit Card at the Center or  via cash deposit  into the below mentioned Bank account 
EFT Payments are not an acceptable method of payment.
- Bank Name: STANDARD BANK
- Branch Code: 012345
- Account Name: VFS Visa Processing SA PTY LTD
- Account Number: 012778842
PLEASE use passport number as reference

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/zaf/en/ita/travel-insurance)
IMPORTANT INFORMATION
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5UTJfBTgcb2yDffqLyopkd/af063ecd8774c5fce5ea799b3982001f/schengen-tourism-checklist.pdf) for the full list of documentary requirements

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 working days before the intended journey.
Applications can be submitted up to 6 months prior to departure date and no earlier.
Non-South African Citizens have to apply 20 working days prior to the departure date.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The visa is issued to sports people (athletes and trainers) invited to participate in competitions (both professionals and amateurs) only for a short term period of time, maximum 90 days. The issuance of this visa must be requested by the competent Italian Federation and duly authorized by the Italian National Olympic Committee (C.O.N.I.). This written authorization must be sent directly by C.O.N.I. to the Consulate of Italy in Cape Town.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The visa is issued to sports people (athletes and trainers) invited to participate in competitions (both professionals and amateurs) only for a short term period of time, maximum 90 days. The issuance of this visa must be requested by the competent Italian Federation and duly authorized by the Italian National Olympic Committee (C.O.N.I.). This written authorization must be sent directly by C.O.N.I. to the Consulate of Italy in Cape Town.

Overview
This visa is issued to those going to Italy for mission purposes. It is a short term period visa (type "C") for stays up to 90 days or can also be a long term period visa (type “D”) for stays beyond 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is issued to those going to Italy for mission purposes. It is a short term period visa (type "C") for stays up to 90 days or can also be a long term period visa (type “D”) for stays beyond 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[ita > zaf > en > Table:Official Mission > Visa Fees 1]

[ita > zaf > en > Table:Official Mission > Visa Fees 2]

*All charges are to be paid in Rands by Debit / Credit Card at the Center or  via cash deposit  into the below mentioned Bank account 
EFT Payments are not accepted.
- Bank Name: STANDARD BANK
- Branch Code: 012345
- Account Name: VFS Visa Processing SA PTY LTD
- Account Number: 012778842
PLEASE use passport number as reference

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/zaf/en/ita/travel-insurance)
IMPORTANT INFORMATION
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6E8I83RaG9hAPom7bf0WZ7/9dcfa4321aad4411190505951f0c7e99/italy-cape-Schengen-and-d-Mission.pdf) for a full list of documentary requirements.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 working days before the intended journey.
Applications can be submitted up to 6 months prior to departure date and no earlier.
Non-South African Citizens have to apply 20 working days prior to the departure date.

## Download Forms
Schengen Short Stay Application form
Schengen Short Stay Application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5UEtKeIfQBE6qVEMYziUQp/6db61312ad7fb730a3b0ed28bc659121/Schengen-Harmonised-application-form-ita-2024.pdf) in Italian

## Overview
This visa allows an applicant to enter Italy for research purposes in Italian universities or research institutions for a short term period (type C) or for a long term stay (type D).

## Visa Fees

[ita > zaf > en > Table:Research > Visa Fees 1]

[ita > zaf > en > Table:Research > Visa Fees 2]

*All charges are to be paid in Rands by Debit / Credit Card at the Center or via cash deposit into the below mentioned Bank account 
EFT Payments are not accepted.
- Bank Name: STANDARD BANK
- Branch Code: 012345
- Account Name: VFS Visa Processing SA PTY LTD
- Account Number: 012778842
PLEASE use passport number as reference

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/zaf/en/ita/travel-insurance)
IMPORTANT INFORMATION
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7wru8Xw4tjBcFEhUfrs9Sl/d17dcf9cdb2a31036eb1aefb01507547/italy-cape-schengen-and-d-research.pdf) for the full list of documentary requirement

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief
                                                                                                            or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 working days before the intended journey.
Applications can be submitted up to 6 months prior to departure date and no earlier.
Non-South African Citizens have to apply 20 working days prior to the departure date.
